options.name: Marker Refinement
options.description: Correct missed/over-broad markers without deleting tests or safety assertions.

options.name: Fixture Caching
options.description: Cache read-only synthetic projection inputs in pytest fixtures.

options.name: Synthetic Fixture Replacement
options.description: Replace real repository scans with tmp_path synthetic fixtures when the test only validates classification logic.
forbidden_changes: remove real scan coverage from slow suite

options.name: Split CLI Smoke from Unit Tests
options.description: Keep CLI smoke under integration/slow marker and keep pure helper tests in fast path.
allowed_changes: slow marker for full CLI aggregation

options.name: CI Stage Matrix
options.description: Run fast, slow, safety, and full stages separately.

optimization_options.recommended_next_step: Apply Option A for missed markers first, then Option C for scan-heavy tests.

ci_stage_matrix.safety: python -m pytest backend/app/foundation backend/app/audit -m 'no_network or no_runtime_write or no_secret' -v
